title: Justice Kant Advocates for Equality in AI: Lessons from Dinkar
description: CJI Surya Kant criticized artificial intelligence for displaying bias against the poor while stressing the importance of social justice. Speaking at the Dinkar Memorial Lecture, he extolled poet Ramdhari Singh Dinkar, whose works epitomize equality and human dignity. Kant warned about societal inequalities persisting despite laws against them.
content: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant criticized artificial intelligence, stating that it demonstrates bias against disadvantaged populations. He underscored the importance of social justice during his address at the Dinkar Memorial Lecture, highlighting... [858 chars]

title: Musk to spend $55 bn on SpaceX AI chip project in Texas - notice
description: WASHINGTON, United States — Elon Musk's SpaceX plans to invest at least $55 billion to build a semiconductor manufacturing facility in Texas, according to a public notice Wednesday, producing chips for artificial intelligence, robotics and data centers in space.
content: WASHINGTON, United States — Elon Musk's SpaceX plans to invest at least $55 billion to build a semiconductor manufacturing facility in Texas, according to a public notice Wednesday, producing chips for artificial intelligence, robotics and data cente... [1098 chars]

title: Microsoft and OpenAI’s definition of AGI was just revealed.
description: The two companies’ famed 2019 contract was made public as part of the Musk v. Altman trial exhibits. The 36-page agreement defines artificial general intelligence as “a highly autonomous system that outperforms humans at most economically valuable work.”
content: The two companies’ famed 2019 contract was made public as part of the Musk v. Altman trial exhibits. The 36-page agreement defines artificial general intelligence as “a highly autonomous system that outperforms humans at most economically valuable wo... [440 chars]

title: Meesho Q4 revenue jumps 47%; operating losses widen on aggressive growth push
description: CEO Vidit Aatrey said that over 70% of the company’s code now is being written using artificial intelligence. More than three fourths of Meesho's orders come through its AI recommendation engine, underscoring the ecommerce marketplace's efforts on driving growth using frontier technology.

title: What is Elon Musk’s new chip-making facility, Terafab, and why is he building it now?
description: Terafab is being developed by SpaceX, Tesla, and xAI, placing it at the centre of Musk’s push to connect artificial intelligence, computing power, and space infrastructure.
content:
Elon Musk’s plan to build a major chipmaking facility in Texas, in the United States, has taken a clearer shape after SpaceX filed plans for a $55 billion (€46.8 billion) chipmaking facility on Wednesday.

title: Why Apple could pay you $95 in an AI lawsuit settlement
description: Apple is set to pay out up to $95 to owners of certain iPhones as part of a $250 million settlement in a class-action lawsuit alleging false advertising of its artificial intelligence capabilities. title: Minister Shelar calls for use of AI to ensure transparency in BMC tenders
description: Mumbai, May 6 (PTI) Maharashtra IT minister Ashish Shelar on Wednesday directed officials to deploy artificial intelligence to eliminate human intervention in the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation’s (BMC) tendering process and enhance transparency. Shelar, who is also the Mumbai Suburban Guardian minister, said AI-driven systems would help monitor variations in tenders and significantly improve efficiency and […]

title: Op Sindoor: India marks first anniversary of its most expansive multi-domain combat mission in half a century
description: New Delhi, May 6 (PTI) Operation Sindoor, launched weeks after the dastardly Pahalgam terror attack last year, marked a paradigm shift in India’s national security calculus through the extensive use of drones, networking and the integration of artificial intelligence in target analysis and acquisition. The operation, billed as the Indian military’s most expansive multi-domain combat […]
